docket_entries.description: CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PECK, STANLEY AS TO DEFENDANT DENNY, RICHARD
PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PLAINTIFF PECK, STANLEY AS TO DEFENDANT DENNY, RICHARD
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, HEARING FOR PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, CALENDAR OF MAR-20-1995, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER $250.00 ATTORNEY FEES; $112.00 COSTS.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DENNY, RICHARD $2,700.25 PRINCIPAL, $250.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $192.32 INTEREST, $112.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,254.57
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $3,413.63 AS TO DEFENDANT DENNY, RICHARD
HEARING FOR PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF PECK, STANLEY HEARING SET FOR MAR-20-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02
PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONF. ARBVITRATION AWARD FILED BY PLAINTIFF PECK, STANLEY SERVED MAR-03-1995, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DENNY, RICHARD
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT DENNY, RICHARD
